codeReview.summary: The migration in commit c40e5ea implements the required About section behavior (heading/body typography, 300-char truncation logic with Show more/less toggle, and surface2 rounded link pills) without introducing blocking regressions.

issues.description: Hardcoded icon colors (`#21C95E`, `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.65)`) were introduced instead of using Tamagui theme tokens; this violates mission token conventions but does not block feature correctness.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The tamagui-frontend-worker skill mandates a strict TDD step for component migrations, but this mission's About-section migration was validated through computed-style checks in agent-browser and added no tests; this indicates the skill procedure does not align with how visual-only migrations are actually executed.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff `skillFeedback.suggestedChanges` explicitly notes the TDD step was skipped for Tamagui visual migration; transcript skeleton shows implementation + validator/agent-browser flow with no test creation.

summary: Reviewed feature about-section-tamagui via feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff. Implementation meets expected behavior and passes review with no blocking issues; one non-blocking token-convention issue and one skill-procedure alignment observation were recorded.
